file_summary: This is a GitHub issue template for submitting feature requests to the ItsDangerous project. It provides a structured format with sections for describing the feature, its motivation, and an example problem it would solve.

line_windows.summary: This window contains the entire issue template structure. Lines 1-3 define the template's metadata (name and about). Lines 5-15 include instructional comments for the user: lines 5-9 prompt for a feature description with relevant details, and lines 11-15 ask for an example problem and whether it can be solved without changes to ItsDangerous. The template uses YAML front matter and HTML comments for guidance.
